input.headline: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier

raw.headline: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier

winner: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier — just don't forget to plant a calendar so you remember to actually enjoy it.

candidates.text: I planted a calendar in my garden so I can check the weather forecast every time I water my plants.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative and specific, with a clever twist that ties the garden to time management."}

candidates.text: To make my spring easier, I spent the entire autumn preemptively apologizing to my dirt so that the worms wouldn't feel intimidated when I eventually show up.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific metaphor with a touch of absurdity"}

candidates.text: I’ll plant my garden now so I don’t have to think about it during the winter—it’s like doing homework *before* the exam!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, relatable, and uses a clever analogy (homework before an exam) that adds surprise and specificity to the headline's advice."}

candidates.text: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier — just don't forget to plant a calendar so you remember to actually enjoy it.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with calendar planting adds clever humor while staying relevant to the topic."}

candidates.text: Doing these fall garden chores will make your spring easier — unless you're a squirrel, in which case your winter will be a breeze.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific reference to squirrels, concise and fits the headline naturally."}

candidates.text: I’m doing my fall gardening chores now so my spring will be easier, but honestly, I’m mostly just trying to leaf my problems behind.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "Puns on 'leaf' and 'problems' add a clever twist, but the joke is slightly generic and could be more specific or surprising."}

candidates.text: I did all the fall garden chores to make my spring easier, but now I'm too exhausted to actually enjoy the spring I just prepared for.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relatable and has a mild twist, but it's slightly generic and lacks the sharp surprise or specificity that would make it stand out in a humor competition."}

candidates.text: Plant bulbs now and they’ll sprout their own lawn chairs for spring—no ladders required!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with 'sprout their own lawn chairs' adds humor while tying back to the headline's message."}

candidates.text: Why did the rake get promoted? It always went above and beyond, pulling weeds from the top of the heap!
